_comment: Resolutions Claude (the implementer) has made. Unioned with the box's runtime data/processed/improvements_log.json (user 'deny' clicks). The improver excludes everything here so it keeps proposing NEW ideas; the dashboard hides resolved proposals.

resolved.title: Implement Calibration Method
resolved.note: Model already fits isotonic+temperature and correctly selects 'none' on validation; calibration didn't help. Addressed the real waste instead: full-data deploy refit.

resolved.title: Enhance Feature Set with Historical Performance
resolved.note: Tried competitive-only form; measured worse (0.8583->0.8595) and reverted. The GBT already extracts this from existing features.

resolved.title: Enhance Data Feed Integration
resolved.note: Added per-day (eventsday) polling across a tournament window + merge preferring most-advanced state; recovered finished games the season feed hid.
